biography: Riku, brother of Panu, is a familiar face to followers of the Hector Trophée, despite his relatively limited appearances in the competition. Known for his thoughtful approach to the game, Riku brings a level of strategic depth that captivates fellow players and spectators alike.

While Riku's presence on the course is marked by his meticulous planning, it is important to note that Riku is considered retired from Hector events. His contributions to the tournament have nonetheless left a lasting impression. Although he will not be participating in Hector Trophée 2026, the possibility of a future return remains open.
